name: Balaji Selvaraj
title: Technical AI Leader

heroQuote.translation: Let all your thoughts be lofty.
heroQuote.author: திருவள்ளுவர் • Thiruvalluvar
heroQuote.imageAlt: Statue of the Tamil poet-philosopher Thiruvalluvar

intro: Hands-on Technical AI Lead with 12+ years spanning product, services, and startup environments.

strategicVision.title: Executive Sponsorship & Portfolio Strategy
strategicVision.description: Secured executive sponsorship and built consensus around a shared strategic direction, transforming five ambiguous initiatives into two funded, enterprise-scale programs.

strategicVision.title: Executive influence, VP to EVP
strategicVision.description: Influence spanning VP → SVP → Chief Scientist → EVP, translating independently sourced AI ideas into sponsored, company-scale mandates.

strategicVision.title: Enterprise Positioning
strategicVision.description: Established a newly formed AI team as a trusted enterprise partner across seven internal business groups and three startups through differentiated AI capabilities aligned to strategic business needs.

strategicVision.title: 3 Scorecards
strategicVision.description: Delivered AI programs across Oncology, Biopharma R&D, and CPSS, aligning with AstraZeneca's 3 R&D priority areas over 3 consecutive years.

strategicVision.title: Authored the 2030 AI Vision
strategicVision.description: Authored a multimodal AI vision aligned with AstraZeneca's 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy strategy, later submitted to Gartner by GITC Chennai.

businessImpact.title: $20–50M projected annual savings
businessImpact.description: Secured and delivered a $3M+ SVP-sponsored drug safety initiative, developing predictive AI toxicology models projected to save $20M–$50M annually.

businessImpact.title: 5 Years → 3 Years
businessImpact.description: Accelerated drug safety programs by two years, reducing study timelines from five years to three through predictive AI toxicology.

businessImpact.title: Portfolio Optimization
businessImpact.description: Optimized the AI investment portfolio, recovering approximately six months of delivery capacity while reducing infrastructure costs.

platform.title: Enterprise AI Platform
platform.description: Built and deployed a foundation-model platform that standardized training, inference, and evaluation across three clinical imaging modalities and 3 internal infrastructures.

platform.title: GxP-Compliant Production AI
platform.description: Engineered production AI pipelines within AstraZeneca's GxP-compliant platform, supporting validated, traceable, and audit-ready AI deployment.

platform.title: Distributed Foundation Model Training
platform.description: Built distributed training infrastructure with FSDP and DeepSpeed, reducing training bottlenecks and enabling enterprise-scale foundation model development.

platform.title: Cost-Optimized Platform Design
platform.description: Designed a cost-efficient AI tooling strategy that reduced annual licensing costs by $40K while preserving enterprise capabilities.

peopleMentoring.title: Global Team Scaling
peopleMentoring.description: Built and led a multicultural AI engineering team spanning five countries, scaling from 1 to 12 engineers.

peopleMentoring.title: Talent Development
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored 10 AI/ML graduate trainees across AstraZeneca and HCL, with 8 transitioning to full-time industry roles and others progressing to postgraduate studies.

peopleMentoring.title: AI Talent Development
peopleMentoring.description: Developed and coached a team of three junior engineers to earn a Kaggle Bronze Medal, ranking 76th of 1,220 teams (Top 6%).

peopleMentoring.title: Emerging Talent Development
peopleMentoring.description: Developed and coached a four-student team to a Top 4 national finish at the Smart India Hackathon (2019).

governanceAI.title: EU AI Act risk mapping
governanceAI.description: Mapped AI deployments against EU AI Act risk tiers — classifying clinical decision-support tools as high-risk and defining conformity assessment, logging, and human-oversight obligations before deployment.

governanceAI.title: Transparency & audit-readiness
governanceAI.description: Designed AI pipelines with model cards, decision logs, and explainability layers to satisfy EU AI Act transparency mandates for high-risk systems in clinical workflows.

governancePrivacy.title: Regulated Data Architecture
governancePrivacy.description: Ensured AI pipelines processing patient and clinical data complied with GDPR and HIPAA by embedding privacy and regulatory controls into the data architecture.

governancePrivacy.title: FAIR Data Governance
governancePrivacy.description: Ensured AI training data adhered to FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) principles, enabling scientifically rigorous, interoperable, and reusable datasets across clinical studies and AI models.

contactIntro: Open to discussing AI leadership opportunities, research collaborations, and advisory roles.
